title: Hamburger Cookies
ingredients: 80 (2 boxes)Nabisco Nilla Wafers for the buns
40 (1 package) Keebler Grasshopper cookies for the burgers
green food coloring for the coconut
honey, to be used as glue
instructions:
Start with a Nilla wafer for the bottom of the bun, stick the grasshopper cookie to the "bun" with a dab of honey.
On opposite sides of the "burger" put dabs of red and yellow frosting.
Color the shredded coconut with some of the green food coloring.
Sprinkle the colored coconut on top of the "burger".
Top with another Nilla using another dab of honey.
Press the wafer down onto the "burger" so that the red and yellow frostings ooze out of the edges.
Lightly coat the top of the "bun" with honey and sprinkle with either the nuts or the sesame seeds.
Make a day ahead to give the honey time to dry.
